TuringResearch Docs

Local-first static docs. No deployment or cloud service required.

Overview Quickstart Concepts Original Repo Parity Public Demo Docs / Dashboard Plugin / MCP Split Repos Security / Privacy FAQ Roadmap

Showcase

The public showcase is a guided view of TuringResearch as a local-first Research OS. It connects the README, public demo, dashboard, VGGT dogfooding case, paper workflow, plugin policy, privacy boundary, limitations, and roadmap.

Source docs:

  • ../../docs/public-showcase.md
  • ../../docs/showcase-walkthrough.md
  • ../../docs/showcase-demo-script.md
  • ../../examples/public_demo/SHOWCASE.md
